name_en: M13408 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Bag Louis Vuitton SARAH Wallet series classic! Murakami interior design clever, with many pockets and card slots. Made of pure copper hardware with soft calfskin... exquisitely crafted, paired with Swiss imported zippers, synchronized with the boutique, practical and versatile essential. Size 19x10cm.
